metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: Inoculation Against the Decline of the Church.

1: For God has not given us a spirit of cowardice, but of power and of love and of sobermindedness.
2: Be diligent to present yourself approved to God, an unashamed workman, cutting straight the word of the truth.
But flee youthful lusts, and pursue righteousness, faith, love, peace with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart.
3: All Scripture is God-breathed and profitable for teaching, for conviction, for correction, for instruction in righteousness.
4: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the course, I have kept the faith.

7.text: This refers to our regenerated human spirit, indwelt by the Holy Spirit. To stand against the church's decline, we must fan into flame this spirit.

16.text: Scripture is the very breath (pneuma) of God. When we read the Bible with our spirit, we inhale the divine element of God Himself.
